World.title: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
World.desc: Unrest took place outside hospital where man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.

World.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
World.desc: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.

World.title: Oscar goes missing after Academy Award winner is blocked from taking it on flight
World.desc: The airline said it regrets the situation and was doing an urgent "comprehensive internal search" for the award.

World.title: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
World.desc: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.

World.title: Venice Biennale jury resigns days before start of top art exhibition
World.desc: It follows growing tensions over the return of Russia for the first time since the full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

World.title: Britney Spears charged in California with driving under influence
World.desc: The pop star is facing one misdemeanour count of driving under the influence of any alcohol and drug.

Technology.title: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
Technology.desc: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?

Technology.title: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
Technology.desc: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.

Technology.title: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
Technology.desc: Isaiah Thomas, known as hmblzayy, was walking a 3,000-mile challenge when he was hit

Technology.title: OpenAI tells ChatGPT models to stop talking about goblins
Technology.desc: The AI firm said that unlike previous model bugs, the issue "crept in subtly".

Technology.title: Meta in row after workers who say they saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
Technology.desc: Meta and its subcontractor disagree over why over 1000 Kenya-based workers were made redundant.

Technology.title: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony
Technology.desc: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.

Science.title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
Science.desc: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

Science.title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
Science.desc: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.

Science.title: UK's biggest ever environmental pollution claim reaches High Court
Science.desc: One of the UK's largest chicken producers and a water company accused of polluting three rivers including the River Wye

Science.title: 'We're living in a shed because of river pollution'
Science.desc: Jane and Tony Coyle spent seven years waiting for planning permission due to River Lugg pollution.

Science.title: First ever talks to ditch fossil fuels as UN deadlock deepens
Science.desc: Some 60 countries are meeting in Colombia as frustration grows with lack of progress in tackling climate change

Science.title: Meet the 19-metre octopus that prowled the ancient seas
Science.desc: Giant octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago, according to fossil evidence.
